orderId.description: The unique identifier of the refunded order.

refundId.description: The unique identifier of the refund process.

paymentTransactionId.description: The unique identifier of the payment transaction associated with the refund.

amount.description: The total amount refunded including currency details.

currency.description: The currency of the refunded amount.

refundedAt.description: The date and time when the refund was issued.
